title: Modest Magic
description: A magic overhaul focusing on a new enchanting system.
body:
![TItle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/591f6bac9a6fd2d112dae36f89aef312d9f8d790.png)

A magic overhaul focusing on a new enchanting system.


![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bfa93e682e408c842aefdba4c7845ccd6a161d7_0.webp)


![Altar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d3bf65c87146d7a71295cc38bb563136f53133c.png)

**The Altar and Pedestals:**

The altar is this mod's replacement for the enchanting table. When surrounded by pedestals, it can be used for various magical recipes.

Both blocks can be placed in any direction, and will connect to themselves.

 

**Infusing:** Combine items from the pedestals into the item on the altar, creating a brand new item

**Enchanting:** Combine items from the pedestals into the item on the altar, enchanting it with specific enchantments

**Summoning:** Combine items from the pedestals into the item on the altar, summoning a mob or entity

 

A recipe can be crafted by shift + right clicking the altar, or activating it with a redstone pulse.

The altar's recipes are all data driven, with various options such as consuming the base item, altering the summoned mob's data, randomizing enchantments, etc.

 
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bfa93e682e408c842aefdba4c7845ccd6a161d7_0.webp)


![Enchanting Tablets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0859eb49c2d3661c4a3845ea9d28c85518fea2e.png)

**Enchanting Tablets:**

Enchanting tablets are this mod's replacement for enchanted books.

They can be crafted via altar infusing, and applied to tools on the smithing table.

Tablets will enchant tools with as many possible enchantments from its available pool as possible, for exactly one level each.

 

Each tablet represents one or more enchantments:

**aquatic** - aqua affinity, depth strider, impaling
**cyclic** - sweeping edge, riptide
**everlasting** - unbreaking
**flinging** - knockback, punch, lunge, wind burst
**glacial** - respiration, frost walker
**hallowed** - smite, channeling
**haunted** - soul speed, swift sneak
**heavy** - blast protection, density
**infested** - bane of arthropods
**recollection** - infinity, multishot, loyalty
**swift** - efficiency, quick charge, lure
**fiery** - fire aspect, flame, fire protection
**light** - silk touch, feather falling
**lucky** - fortune, looting, luck of the sea
**serrated** - sharpness, thorns 
**puncturing** - power, piercing, projectile protection, breach
**enduring** - mending, curse of vanishing
**secure** - protection, curse of binding 

 
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bfa93e682e408c842aefdba4c7845ccd6a161d7_0.webp)


![EMI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37c0b562a51c24deb2c63cf833f4634d2e9e318.png)

**Recipe Viewing:**

It is recommended that you use EMI to view the recipes in this mod.

All altar recipe types and smithing recipes can be seen using it.

Altar recipes show a rotating wheel of all the ingredients, the amount of pedestals required, and the output item.

 
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bfa93e682e408c842aefdba4c7845ccd6a161d7_0.webp)


**Info:**
Mod Versions from 1.16.5 and Below are Considered a Different Mod and Have Been Removed from Curseforge

The mod will not be backported past 1.19.2

**Please do not ask for these things**

 

If you have any problems, suggestions, or want to be included, join the discord!

Feel free to recommend features

You may use this mod in any modpack or video if you wish to.
